chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ إِلَى صَاحِبِ الدَّارِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – The Indication and the wordings upon the Master<sup>asws</sup> of the world (12<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/3)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: خَرَجَ عَنْ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) حِينَ قُتِلَ الزُّبَيْرِيُّ لَعَنَهُ اللَّهُ هَذَا جَزَاءُ مَنِ اجْتَرَأَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فِي أَوْلِيَائِهِ يَزْعُمُ أَنَّهُ يَقْتُلُنِي وَ لَيْسَ لِي عَقِبٌ فَكَيْفَ رَأَى قُدْرَةَ اللَّهِ فِيهِ وَ وُلِدَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ سَمَّاهُ م‏ح‏م‏د فِي سَنَةِ سِتٍّ وَ خَمْسِينَ وَ مِائَتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abdullah who said,

‘There came out from Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup>, when Al-Zubeyri<sup>la</sup>, may Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Curse him<sup>la</sup> was killed: ‘This is a Recompense of the one who is audacious unto Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with regards to His<sup>azwj</sup> Guardians<sup>asws</sup>. He claimed that he would murder me<sup>asws</sup>, and there wouldn’t be an offspring for me<sup>asws</sup>? So how does he see the Determination of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> regarding him<sup>asws</sup>?’ And there was I<sup>asws</sup> was blessed with a son<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> named him<sup>asws</sup> as M H M D (Abbreviated as it is not allowed to mention his<sup>asws</sup> name), in the year two hundred and fifty six’.
en.sarwar: Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad al-Ash‘ari from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah who has said the following. “(A letter) came out from abu Muhammad (a.s.) when al-Zubayri, may Allah condemn him, was killed. It said, “This is the recompense for those who disregard Allah in the matters of the people whom He has appointed as His authority over the cratures. He thought he could murder me and I do not have a son. How did he experience the power of Allah in the matter. A boy was born to him and he named him M.H.M.D. in the year two hundred fifty six. (Abbreviation stands for the name of the Imam because of the prohibition to pronounce it in a complete word.).”
